name: Value Pawn & Jewelry
description_short: Value Pawn & Jewelry Longwood, Florida — Miami pawn shop offering collateral-based loans, gold buying, and pre-owned brand-name merchandise at 25–70% of...
description_long:
Value Pawn & Jewelry is a Miami, Florida pawn shop operating under the EZPAWN family of stores brand, located at 736 NW 183rd Street in the 33169 zip code. The store serves the local community with a broad mix of financial services and retail, positioned as a one-stop shop for quick cash needs and budget-conscious shoppers. As part of a larger chain, the location benefits from corporate infrastructure including a digital rewards program, an online shop, and an instant quote tool not typically found at independent pawn shops.

The store's primary financial service is collateral-based pawn loans: customers bring in items of value, receive a cash loan, and can reclaim their items by repaying the loan plus fees within the agreed term. Beyond loans, Value Pawn buys gold and diamond jewelry outright, with staff who test precious metals to verify karat and weight before making an offer. The retail side sells thousands of pre-owned brand-name items — electronics, jewelry, tools, gaming gear, handbags, and sneakers — at 25% to 70% below new retail prices, with layaway and third-party 'Take Today' financing available for purchases.

What distinguishes this location from independent pawn shops is its EZPAWN chain infrastructure. The EZ+ Rewards program allows customers to manage pawn loans, layaways, and reward points digitally and make online payments on extensions (not available in AZ, OR, or PA). An Instant Quote tool lets customers get an estimated value for electronics before setting foot in the store. Layaway requires only 10% down with monthly payments — a useful option for shoppers without credit access. The store also carries firearms and offers auto loans, broadening its financial services footprint.

Value Pawn & Jewelry fills a real gap for cash-strapped consumers who own valuable assets but lack access to traditional credit. However, pawn loan fee structures and APRs are not disclosed on the website — a significant transparency gap given that pawn loans often carry high effective interest rates. Shoppers and borrowers alike should ask for the full fee schedule before transacting. The Sunday-only hours of noon to 5pm also limit accessibility for those with weekday constraints.
pros: EZ+ Rewards program lets customers manage pawn loans, layaways, and rewards digitally from any device
Online Instant Quote tool for electronics — get an estimated cash value before visiting the store
Pre-owned merchandise priced 25–70% below new retail on brand-name electronics, jewelry, and tools
Layaway available year-round with only 10% down and monthly payments — no credit required
Expert gold buyers test all precious metals to ensure accurate karat and weight pricing
Online shop updated daily with new inventory, enabling remote browsing before visiting
Extended weekday hours (9am–7pm Monday–Friday) accommodate working customers
cons: Pawn loan interest rates, fees, and repayment terms are not disclosed on the website — must be confirmed in person
Online payment feature for pawn extensions and layaways is unavailable in Arizona, Oregon, and Pennsylvania
Sunday hours are limited to 12pm–5pm only, reducing weekend accessibility
All retail inventory is pre-owned with no manufacturer warranty; brand owners are explicitly not affiliated
'Take Today' flexible payment options depend on third-party lenders and credit eligibility — not guaranteed
best_for: Miami residents who need immediate cash and own electronics, jewelry, tools, or other valuables to use as collateral
Bargain shoppers seeking brand-name pre-owned electronics, jewelry, and gear at steep discounts without credit approval
Gold and diamond jewelry owners looking for an immediate cash sale with on-site metal testing
Budget-conscious shoppers who prefer layaway over credit cards or financing
diagnosis: Value Pawn & Jewelry is best for Miami residents who need fast cash against owned assets or want deeply discounted pre-owned goods without a credit check. The main caveat is that pawn loan costs — including fees and effective APR — are not published online, so borrowers must review the full fee schedule in person before committing to a loan.
services: Pawn loans (collateral-based, terms and fees apply)
Gold and diamond jewelry buying (all karats, broken gold accepted)
Online shop with daily inventory updates
Instant Quote tool for electronics (online, pre-visit estimate)
EZ+ Rewards program (points on pawn, redeem, sell, and purchase transactions)
Take Today flexible payment options (third-party, credit eligibility required)
Jewelry VIP Program (guaranteed loan amounts, free cleaning, stone replacement)
Product Protection Plans (electronics and merchandise coverage)
